name: NFL Salute to Service
discount: Up to 50% off select game tickets; exclusive military appreciation games with discounted group ticket packages and field access experiences
eligibility: Active duty, veterans, retirees, and military families. Discount availability varies by team and game.
verification: Military ID or Veterans Advantage/WeSalute membership. Book through team's official military ticket page or GovX.

name: NBA Military Appreciation
discount: Up to 50% off select games; military appreciation nights include courtside experiences, pre-game ceremonies, and on-court access for select veterans
eligibility: Active duty, veterans, National Guard, Reservists, and immediate family members. Varies by team.
verification: Military ID at box office or via team's military ticket portal. Some teams use ID.me verification.

name: MLB Salute to Service
discount: Discounted game tickets (typically 20–50% off) and premium experiences including dugout tours, batting practice access, and military appreciation weekend packages
eligibility: Active duty, veterans, retirees, National Guard, Reservists. Varies by team and promotion.
verification: Military ID or verify via GovX/ID.me on team websites. Available through team's community/military page.

name: NASCAR Military Appreciation
discount: Free or heavily discounted race tickets at select events; military appreciation races include pit road access passes, garage tours, meet-and-greets with drivers, and fan zone experiences
eligibility: Active duty, veterans, and military families. Many tracks offer free admission for active duty on appreciation weekends.
verification: Military ID at track gates on designated events. Some tickets require advance registration at govx.com or nascar.com.

name: UFC Fight Pass — Military Discount
discount: 50% off UFC Fight Pass annual streaming subscription (includes all live UFC events, Fight Pass Prelims, and entire fight library)
eligibility: Active duty, veterans, first responders, and military families with valid ID.
verification: Verify through ID.me at ufc.tv during checkout. Discount applied at point of subscription.

name: MLS Military Appreciation
discount: Discounted ticket packages (typically 25–50% off) at select MLS clubs; military appreciation matches include field access, pre-game ceremonies, and meet-and-greets
eligibility: Active duty, veterans, National Guard, Reservists, and dependents. Availability varies by MLS club.
verification: Military ID or GovX verification on club websites. Contact individual MLS club ticket office.

name: NHL Salute to Service
discount: Discounted game tickets (varies 20–40%) and military appreciation nights with on-ice recognition, dressing room tours, and exclusive merchandise at select games
eligibility: Active duty, veterans, retirees, National Guard, and Reservists. Varies by team and arena.
verification: Military ID at box office or team military ticket portal. Some franchises use GovX/ID.me.

name: PGA Tour — Birdies for the Brave
discount: Free tournament tickets at select PGA Tour events for active duty and veterans; premium hospitality access and meet-and-greet with PGA Tour professionals at special military appreciation days
eligibility: Active duty, veterans, National Guard, Reservists, and military families. Participating tournaments vary by year.
verification: Register at birdiesforthebrave.com with military ID. Free tickets distributed by participating tournament offices.

name: Alaska Airlines
discount: Military fare discounts and one free checked bag for active duty military; priority boarding for service members and veterans in uniform
eligibility: Active duty military with valid orders for fare discounts; all veterans in uniform for priority boarding.
verification: Military ID and travel orders at check-in. Book through alaskaair.com or call for military fares.

name: Hertz Car Rental
discount: Up to 25% off rentals; Gold Plus Rewards military members get complimentary President's Circle status upgrade (skip-the-counter, free car upgrades)
eligibility: U.S. military veterans, active duty, National Guard, Reservists, and immediate family. Available worldwide.
verification: USAA membership or military ID. Book through usaa.com/hertz or hertz.com military portal.

name: National Car Rental
discount: Military members receive discounted rates and complimentary Emerald Club Executive status (guaranteed vehicle upgrades, dedicated lanes)
eligibility: Active duty, veterans, government employees, and military families.
verification: Military ID or government rate code at booking. Register for Emerald Club through nationalcar.com.

name: Wyndham Hotels (La Quinta, Days Inn, Ramada, Super 8)
discount: Up to 20% off across all Wyndham brands including La Quinta, Days Inn, Ramada, Super 8, Wingate, Baymont, and Travelodge
eligibility: Active duty, veterans, retirees, National Guard, Reservists, and immediate family members.
verification: Military ID at check-in or book via veteransadvantage.com/wyndham. Must identify as military at reservation.

name: Best Western Hotels & Resorts
discount: 10–30% off best available rate; free night certificates available through Best Western Rewards for military members at over 4,700 properties worldwide
eligibility: Active duty, veterans, retirees, National Guard, Reservists, and dependents.
verification: Military ID at check-in or request military rate at booking. Best Western Rewards membership required for free night benefits.

name: Choice Hotels (Comfort Inn, Quality Inn, Econo Lodge)
discount: Up to 20% off at participating properties; military government rate available at Comfort Inn, Comfort Suites, Quality Inn, Clarion, Econo Lodge, Rodeway Inn, and MainStay Suites
eligibility: Active duty military and government employees for government rate; veterans for standard military discount.
verification: Military ID or government travel card at check-in. Request military or government rate at booking.
